title: Here's Why You Should Retain Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) for Now
text: Investors are optimistic about Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) on business recovery and expansion in emerging markets.

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Gains From ROSA Sales Growth Amid FX Woes
text: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) plans to work on the overall shift of the company's legacy knee systems to a fully rounded-out Persona portfolio.

title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings: Growth Strategies For 2023 Instill Confidence
text: Zimmer Biomet Holdings outlined strategies to gain market share in the knee sector and foster innovation in hip products. ZBH has raised its 2023 growth forecast, reflecting confidence in its strategic initiatives. It also reported strong financial performance in Q2 2023, with increased sales and stable EPS.

title: Zimmer Biomet Announces Key Updates to Company's Executive Leadership Team
text: WARSAW, Ind., Sept. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE and SIX: ZBH), a global medical technology leader, today announced key updates to the Company's Executive Leadership Team. Wilfred van Zuilen has been promoted to Group President, EMEA; Mark Bezjak was promoted to President of the Americas; and Chief Science, Technology and Innovation Officer Nitin Goyal, M.D. has been appointed to the Executive Leadership Team, all reporting directly to President and Chief Executive Officer Ivan Tornos.

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Business Recovery Continues Despite FX Woe
text: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) is benefiting from increased provider capacity, resulting in backlog pull-through in the recent quarters.
